author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(bundlesize): consolidate usage of "classnames" helper (#5138)
body:
* fix(bundlesize): consolidate usage of "classnames" helper

We have this helper in `@algolia/ui-components-shared` as well as in `classnames`. I chose to consolidate on our own helper

Note however that this still needs a PR to the shared repo to do nested classes

* update bundle

* update for type
